nasb.text: You shall make fifty loops in the one curtain, and you shall make fifty loops on the edge of the curtain that is in the second set; the loops shall be opposite each other.

esv.text: Fifty loops you shall make on the one curtain, and fifty loops you shall make on the edge of the curtain that is in the second set; the loops shall be opposite one another.

cnv.text: 在這幅幔子上，你要做五十個鈕扣；在另一組幔子最後一幅的邊上，你也要做五十個鈕扣，這些鈕扣要彼此相對。

ccb.text: 每幅大幔子钉五十个，扣环要两两相对，
